sql_array: CREATE TABLE EMPLOYEES (EMP_ID integer not null, NAME varchar(50), DEPARTMENT varchar(50), primary key (EMP_ID));
INSERT INTO EMPLOYEES (EMP_ID, NAME, DEPARTMENT) VALUES (1, 'Alice Smith', 'Sales');
INSERT INTO LEADS (ORG_ID, LEAD_ID, FREETEXT_ID, SUBJECT, NAME_FIRST, NAME_LAST, TITLE) VALUES (1, 101, 1001, 'Quarterly Sales Report', 'Alice', 'Smith', 'Sales Performance');
UPDATE LEADS SET SUBJECT = 'Annual Sales Report' WHERE FREETEXT_ID = 1001;
